feed.title: Hermosawave Photography
feed.subtitle: A series of daily landscape photographs by Daniel Sofer, 20 years running.

entry.title: Colorful Bridge・カラフルな橋
entry.content:
Arashiyama's Togetsukyo bridge at night, illuminated in a special, colorful display.

夜、特別なカラーイルミネーションに彩られた嵐山の渡月橋。
entry.summary: Arashiyama's Togetsukyo bridge at night, illuminated in a special, colorful display. 夜、特別なカラーイルミネーションに彩られた嵐山の渡月橋。

entry.title: Konoe Cherry Tree・近衛桜
entry.content:
Closeup on one of the hanging branches of this cherry tree, at the former location of the Konoe Residence in Kyoto Gyoen, the former Imperial Palace park. This "Itozakura" weeping sakura is the most famous cherry tree in the park, drawing many visitors on this spring day.

旧皇居の庭園である京都御苑内、かつての近衛邸跡にある桜の枝のクローズアップだ。この糸桜（イトザクラ）の品種のしだれ桜は、この庭園で最も有名な桜であり、春の陽気の中、今日も多くの訪問者を集めていた。
entry.summary: Closeup on one of the hanging branches of this cherry tree, at the former location of the Konoe Residence in Kyoto Gyoen, the former Imperial Palace park. This "Itozakura" weeping sakura is the most famous cherry tree in the park, drawing many visitors on this spring day. 旧皇居の庭園である京都御苑内、かつての近衛邸跡にある桜の枝のクローズアップだ。この糸桜（イトザクラ）の品種のしだれ桜は、この庭園で最も有名な桜であり、春の陽気の中、今日も多くの訪問者を集めていた。

entry.title: Inviting Happiness・開運招福
entry.content:
The Torii gate at Kurumazaki Jinja shrine offering prosperity and good luck to those who pass through, accompanied by a beautiful blooming cherry tree.

開運招福の額が掲げられた車折神社の鳥居と、美しく咲き誇る桜の木。
entry.summary: The Torii gate at Kurumazaki Jinja shrine offering prosperity and good luck to those who pass through, accompanied by a beautiful blooming cherry tree. 開運招福の額が掲げられた車折神社の鳥居と、美しく咲き誇る桜の木。

entry.title: Demizu no Itozakura・出水の糸桜

link.title: Demizu no Itozakura・出水の糸桜

entry.content:
This famous weeping cherry tree in Kyoto's Imperial Palace Park blooms earlier than most other trees in town.

京都御苑にあるこの有名な糸桜は、苑内の他の桜よりも早く咲く。
entry.summary: This famous weeping cherry tree in Kyoto's Imperial Palace Park blooms earlier than most other trees in town. 京都御苑にあるこの有名な糸桜は、苑内の他の桜よりも早く咲く。

entry.title: Pink, White & Blue・ピンク、ホワイト、ブルー

link.title: Pink, White & Blue・ピンク、ホワイト、ブルー

entry.content:
Cherry blossoms at the tomb of Abe no Seimei, a 10th Century Heian court official and renowned specialist of Onmyodo.

10世紀の平安宮廷の官人で陰陽道の専門家であった安倍晴明墓所の桜。
entry.summary: Cherry blossoms at the tomb of Abe no Seimei, a 10th Century Heian court official and renowned specialist of Onmyodo. 10世紀の平安宮廷の官人で陰陽道の専門家であった安倍晴明墓所の桜。

entry.title: River Rocks・川の岩
entry.content:
Rocks above - and below- the surface of the shallow Oigawa river in Arashiyama.

嵐山の浅い大堰川の水面上と水面下の岩。
entry.summary: Rocks above - and below- the surface of the shallow Oigawa river in Arashiyama. 嵐山の浅い大堰川の水面上と水面下の岩。

entry.title: Saga Torch Festival・嵯峨御松明式

link.title: Saga Torch Festival・嵯峨御松明式

entry.content:
The Saga Otaimatsu Torch Festival is held every March 15 at Seiryo-ji Temple, celebrating Buddha's passing. Three 7 meter tall torches are set on fire, with giant flames and embers flying everywhere. In fact, it's said to be good luck if embers land on your clothes.

毎年3月15日、清涼寺でお釈迦様の入滅を祝う「嵯峨御松明式」が開催される。高さ7メートルの松明3本が燃やされ、巨大な炎や燃えかすがあちこちに飛び散る。実際、服に火がつくと縁起が良いと言われている。
entry.summary: The Saga Otaimatsu Torch Festival is held every March 15 at Seiryo-ji Temple, celebrating Buddha's passing. Three 7 meter tall torches are set on fire, with giant flames and embers flying everywhere. In fact, it's said to be good luck if embers land on your clothes. 毎年3月15日、清涼寺でお釈迦様の入滅を祝う「嵯峨御松明式」が開催される。高さ7メートルの松明3本が燃やされ、巨大な炎や燃えかすがあちこちに飛び散る。実際、服に火がつくと縁起が良いと言われている。

entry.title: Ticket Gates・改札口
entry.content:
Looking down on the ticket gates at Kyoto Station.
🎞️ Fujicolor Superia 400

京都駅の改札を見下ろす。
entry.summary: Looking down on the ticket gates at Kyoto Station. 🎞️ Fujicolor Superia 400 京都駅の改札を見下ろす。

entry.title: Katsura River・桂川
entry.content:
Taken from the Hankyu train crossing over the Katsura River, on a sunny afternoon.

晴れた日の午後、桂川の上を渡る阪急電車から撮影。
entry.summary: Taken from the Hankyu train crossing over the Katsura River, on a sunny afternoon. 晴れた日の午後、桂川の上を渡る阪急電車から撮影。

entry.title: Sanjo Ohashi・三条大橋
entry.content:
Standing on the Sanjo Ohashi bridge, looking south along the Kamogawa river.

三条大橋の上に立ち、鴨川に沿って南を見る。
entry.summary: Standing on the Sanjo Ohashi bridge, looking south along the Kamogawa river. 三条大橋の上に立ち、鴨川に沿って南を見る。
